description: 核心 CLI 命令描述符 — --help 顶层命令列表

replacements.description: \"Interactive configuration: description: "交互式配置凭证、渠道、网关和代理默认设置"
replacements.description: \"Create and verify local b: description: "创建和验证 OpenClaw 状态的本地备份归档"
replacements.description: \"Open the Control UI with: description: "使用当前令牌打开控制面板"
replacements.description: \"Reset local config/state: description: "重置本地配置/状态（保留 CLI）"
replacements.description: \"Uninstall the gateway ser: description: "卸载网关服务和本地数据（保留 CLI）"
replacements.description: \"Import state from another: description: "从其他代理系统导入状态"
replacements.description: \"List stored conversation: description: "列出已存储的对话会话"
replacements.description: \"Inspect stored transcript: description: "查看已存储的会话记录"
replacements.description: \"List and manage inferred: description: "列出并管理推断出的后续跟进事项"
replacements.description: \"Open the ring-zero setup: description: "打开 ring-zero 设置与修复助手"
replacements.description: \"Guided setup for auth, mo: description: "引导配置认证、模型、网关、工作区、渠道和技能"
replacements.description:\n \"Non-interactive co:
description:
      "非交互式配置工具（get/set/patch/unset/file/schema/validate）。无子命令运行时启动引导式设置。"
replacements.description: \"Health checks + quick fix: description: "网关和渠道的健康检查与快速修复"
replacements.description: \"Send, read, and manage me: description: "发送、读取和管理消息及渠道操作"
replacements.description: \"Run an agent turn via the: description: "通过网关运行一次代理轮次（嵌入式使用 --local）"
replacements.description: \"Manage isolated agents (w: description: "管理隔离代理（工作区、认证、路由）"
replacements.description: \"Show channel health and r: description: "显示渠道健康状态和最近会话收件人"
replacements.description: \"Fetch health from the run: description: "从运行中的网关获取健康状态"
replacements.description: \"Manage OpenClaw mcp.serve: description: "管理 OpenClaw mcp.servers 配置和渠道桥接"
replacements.description: \"Inspect durable backgroun: description: "查看持久化后台任务和 TaskFlow 状态"
replacements.description: \"Inspect metadata-only age: description: "查看仅含元数据的代理运行和工具操作记录"
